mdRecord.dcterms:title: Fiduciary Accounts: Receivership of the estate belonging to Ola A. Howard
mdRecord.dcterms:description: Receivership of the estate belonging to Ola A. Howard B.G. Howard, Receiver of Maidie's estate until she reached 21 years of age. B.G. Howard, Receiver of the estate belonging to Ola A. Howard, Prior to her reaching 21 years of age Recorded in Settlement Book 1,Page 181, in the Floyd County Circuit Court
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Court Records
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
